chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 904 of 2024 Cr. Bail App. No. S – 968 of 2024 Cr. Bail App. No. S – 969 of 2024 Cr. Bail App. No. S – 34 of 2025 Cr. Bail App. No. S – 35 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of post-arrest bail 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of post-arrest bail 15.01.2026 Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- No one is present for the applicants today also. So was the case on the last date of hearing. Matters stand dismissed for non-prosecution. Office to place a signed copy of this order in the captioned connected matters. J U D G E Abdul Basit
